environments.name: Production
environments.purpose: Live operator and platform environment on the current LV3 single-node estate.
environments.isolation_model: Production uses the authoritative bare lv3.org hostnames and repo-managed runtime state.
environments.operator_access: Private-only services stay on the Tailscale-backed operator path through the Proxmox host.
environments.notes: This is the only environment currently applied live.

environments.name: Staging
environments.purpose: Pre-production validation lane for staged edge-published and operator-facing services.
environments.isolation_model: Staging reuses the shared host and edge VM but must use separate DNS names, secrets, and mutable service state.
environments.operator_access: Until a dedicated staging access path exists, operator-only staged services follow the same private path as production.

co_location_exceptions.rationale: Staging currently shares the primary Proxmox host until the auxiliary cloud failure domain is active.

environments.notes: Live from 2026-03-27 with docker-runtime-staging and monitoring-staging on vmbr20; staged guest network policy and service bindings remain follow-up work.
